backend.description: Backend service memory bank. Use for event sourcing patterns, DB schema, API endpoints, bank importers, testing conventions, and Python coding style.

frontend.description: Frontend service memory bank. Use for component patterns, TypeScript rules, CSS Modules, Chart.js, HTTP hooks, and grid layout system.

specs.description: Main capability specs. Use to understand existing requirements, find what capabilities exist, or check what a feature is supposed to do.
